headline: Is e.l.f. Beauty, Inc. (ELF) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ELF a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on e.l.f. Beauty, Inc. on TheValueNerd’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ELF. e.l.f. Beauty, Inc.’s share was trading at $52.28 as of June 8th. ELF’s trailing and forward P/E were 116.91 and 15.58 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Bernstein Initiates Coverage On Estee Lauder Cos with Market Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $82
summary: Bernstein  analyst Cristian Rios   initiates coverage on Estee Lauder Cos (NYSE:EL) with a Market Perform rating and announces Price Target of $82.
